text:
cc -Wall -I. -O4 -ffast-math -D__X264__ -DHAVE_MMXEXT -DHAVE_SSE2 -DARCH_X86 -DS
YS_FREEBSD  -march=pentiumpro -O  -O2 -funroll-loops -ffast-math -fPIC -I/usr/lo
cal/include -I/usr/X11R6/include -DVISUALIZE=1 -DHAVE_PTHREAD -s -fomit-frame-po
inter   -c -o muxers.o muxers.c
muxers.c: In function `open_file_mp4':
muxers.c:650: error: too many arguments to function `gf_isom_open'
gmake: *** [muxers.o] Error 1
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/multimedia/x264.
